25/06/2025, 22:52 Designated service | AUSTRAC

\@ Australian Government
AUSTRAC

Designated service

Home / Designated service

A service that is listed in section 6 of the AML/CTF Act (because it has been identified as
posing a risk for money laundering and terrorism financing) and which meets the
geographical link. Designated services include a range of business activities in the
financial services, bullion, gambling and digital currency exchange sectors. Entities that
provide any of these services are reporting entities. Reporting entities have obligations
under the AML/CTF Act.

See

AML/CTF Act 2006 section 6, tables 1-3

https:/Awww.austrac.gov.au/glossary/designated-service
